hooks.command: sh -lc 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) || exit 2; PYTHONPATH="$ROOT${PYTHONPATH:+:$PYTHONPATH}" CLAUDE_HOOK_REPO_ROOT="$ROOT" CODEX_HOOK_MISSING_ORCHESTRATION_ID_POLICY=global python3 -m tools.hooks.cli --backend claude --event UserPromptSubmit --repo-root "$ROOT"'

sh -lc 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) || exit 2; PYTHONPATH="$ROOT${PYTHONPATH:+:$PYTHONPATH}" CLAUDE_HOOK_REPO_ROOT="$ROOT" CODEX_HOOK_MISSING_ORCHESTRATION_ID_POLICY=global python3 -m tools.hooks.cli --backend claude --event PreToolUse --repo-root "$ROOT"'

sh -lc 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) || exit 2; PYTHONPATH="$ROOT${PYTHONPATH:+:$PYTHONPATH}" CLAUDE_HOOK_REPO_ROOT="$ROOT" CODEX_HOOK_MISSING_ORCHESTRATION_ID_POLICY=global python3 -m tools.hooks.cli --backend claude --event PostToolUse --repo-root "$ROOT"'

sh -lc 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) || exit 2; PYTHONPATH="$ROOT${PYTHONPATH:+:$PYTHONPATH}" CLAUDE_HOOK_REPO_ROOT="$ROOT" CODEX_HOOK_MISSING_ORCHESTRATION_ID_POLICY=global python3 -m tools.hooks.cli --backend claude --event Stop --repo-root "$ROOT"'
